name: libxml-dom-perl
title: libxml-dom-perl
summary: Perl module for building DOM Level 1 compliant doc structures
description:
Perl module for building DOM Level 1 compliant doc structures
This module parses XML strings or files and builds a data structure
that conforms to the API of the Document Object Model as described at
http://www.w3.org/TR/REC-DOM-Level-1.  See the XML::Parser manpage
for other available features of the XML::DOM::Parser class.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libxml-dom-perl because Perl module for building DOM Level 1 compliant doc structures.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libxml-dom-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libxml-dom-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libxml-dom-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
